title: toges
description: This mod introduces a new dimension and its subsidiary creatures to propagate the glory of the Lord.
body:
This mod was created by the Lord's most devout believer, Woupeolih, and entrusted to me to spread the glory of the Lord.

![woupeolih's head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1874e32d9fc91b01c1d2e20ed249989626f7cad7.png)

During the Neogene period, the Lord engraved the code of this mod onto a stone. This stone was later transported through various means—geological shifts, trade, and ocean currents—until it arrived in Guangdong, China. In 1814, Hong Xiuquan interpreted it and founded the God Worshipping Society.
Now, during a dream, Woupeolih successfully deciphered the true meaning of this stone and created the mod, which I am sharing on their behalf.
In this mod, by arranging Mud into a rectangle with at least a 2×2 internal space and using a Brush on the interior, a portal will be activated.

![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94d1751b4b2cad0df5819109c6b1e338e7559ca7.png)

Upon entering the portal, you will arrive at an eerie and terrifying continent, face a variety of aberrant creatures, remain steadfast, defeat them, and thereby earn the qualification to meet an avatar formed from a strand of the planar Lord's leg hair.

![Land](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e2e1f5350a6109255462ffda46244af838cc55_0.webp)
![Aberrant Creatures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a27656d1b719b0d616bbfcfd983b1cbaac70d03_0.webp)
![Lord(left)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/788feeb1a322e557a1f3cdb9fc2aa7b887632f0f_0.webp)
![Lord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20be551a6e7e96e2ae10d0584b420d56925cd2db_0.webp)
